title: Bashe
description: Modpack of our minecraft server ᙘᗅSᕼᙍ.
body:
**Welcome to ᙘᗅSᕼᙍ,** a fully modded survival experience designed for our Discord community! This pack enhances Minecraft 1.19.4 with new biomes, better optimization, and tons of quality-of-life features to take your gameplay to the next level.

### - 🌍 Explore a Revamped World
New biomes and improved terrain generation for more immersive exploration.
Better structures to make the world feel more alive.
Improved villages, dungeons, and underground generation for added depth.

### - ⚡ Smooth & Optimized Gameplay
Lag-free experience with performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and FerriteCore.
Faster loading times and better FPS, even with tons of mods!

### - 🔧 Enhanced Redstone & Automation
Better redstone mechanics with essential tweaks for builders and engineers.
Improved block interactions and automation tools to streamline survival and technical gameplay.

### - 🛠 Tons of Quality-of-Life Upgrades
More building blocks and furniture to customize your base.
Better animations, lighting, and UI improvements for a smoother experience.
Improved caves, mineshafts, and strongholds for more exciting underground adventures.
Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or redstone engineer, this modpack brings a fresh and optimized experience while keeping Minecraft's core survival feel intact.

### - 🔗 Join Our Discord & Play!
This modpack is custom-made for our community. Join us on Discord to get the modpack, connect with players, and experience the best modded survival together!

For more information go check our discord: [Discord link 🔗](https://discord.gg/FyCVUBRbcw)
